scripts.build:safari: pnpm build && vite build --config vite.config.safari.ts && xcrun safari-web-extension-converter dist/ --app-name 'Price Tracker' --bundle-identifier 'com.derekward.price-tracker' --macos-only --no-open --no-prompt --project-location safari/ --copy-resources --force && node scripts/fix-safari-manifest.js
